function.name: run_custom_test
function.arguments:
{"code":"import os

def parse_theta_results(fname):
    with open(fname, 'r') as f:
        lines = f.readlines()
        header = lines[0].strip().split('\t')
        values = lines[1].strip().split('\t')

        nll = float(values[0])
        mu = list(map(float, values[1].split(',')))
        mu_normal = mu[0]
        mu_tumors = mu[1:]

        C = [list(map(lambda x: int(x) if x.isdigit() else None, group.split(':'))) for group in values[2].split(',')]
        p_star = [float(p) if p.replace('.', '', 1).isdigit() else None for p in values[3].split(',')]

        return {
            'NLL': nll,
            'mu_normal': mu_normal,
            'mu_tumors': mu_tumors,
            'C': C,
            'p*': p_star
        }

def main():
    # Create a temporary THetA output file with a single tumor example
    sample = (
        "NLL\tmu\tC\tp*\n"
        "12.5\t0.4,0.6\t2:3\t0.1,0.2\n"
    )
    fname = "theta_test.txt"
    with open(fname, "w") as f:
        f.write(sample)

    # Parse the THetA results
    result = parse_theta_results(fname)
    print(result)

    # Clean up
    os.remove(fname)

    # Additional tests
    multi_tumor_sample = (
        "NLL\tmu\tC\tp*\n"
        "15.2\t0.2,0.5,0.3\t2:3,4:1\t0.1,0.2,0.7\n"
    )
    multi_tumor_fname = "multi_theta_test.txt"
    with open(multi_tumor_fname, "w") as f:
        f.write(multi_tumor_sample)

    multi_result = parse_theta_results(multi_tumor_fname)
    print(multi_result)

    placeholder_sample = (
        "NLL\tmu\tC\tp*\n"
        "10.0\t0.5,0.5\t2:?\t0.3,A\n"
    )
    placeholder_fname = "placeholder_theta_test.txt"
    with open(placeholder_fname, "w") as f:
        f.write(placeholder_sample)

    placeholder_result = parse_theta_results(placeholder_fname)
    print(placeholder_result)

    # Clean up
    os.remove(multi_tumor_fname)
    os.remove(placeholder_fname)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()","test_snippet":"result = parse_theta_results('theta_test.txt')
assert result == {'NLL': 12.5, 'mu_normal': 0.4, 'mu_tumors': [0.6], 'C': [[2, 3]], 'p*': [0.1, 0.2]}

multi_result = parse_theta_results('multi_theta_test.txt')
assert multi_result == {'NLL': 15.2, 'mu_normal': 0.2, 'mu_tumors': [0.5, 0.3], 'C': [[2, 3], [4, 1]], 'p*': [0.1, 0.2, 0.7]}

placeholder_result = parse_theta_results('placeholder_theta_test.txt')
assert placeholder_result == {'NLL': 10.0, 'mu_normal': 0.5, 'mu_tumors': [0.5], 'C': [[2, None]], 'p*': [0.3, None]}"}
